## 🧪 Testing

<!-- How did you test this? What should reviewers test? -->
- [ ] All Jupyter notebook cells run without errors
- [ ] Code examples work correctly
- [ ] Tested with Python 3.10+
- [ ] Verified on Windows/Mac/Linux (if applicable)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Followed style guidelines ([BEST_PRACTICES.md](../BEST_PRACTICES.md))
- [ ] Added comments/docstrings where needed
- [ ] No hardcoded file paths (using relative paths)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
- [ ] No large files (>10MB) committed
- [ ] For lessons: Clear learning objectives
- [ ] For exercises: Includes solutions
- [ ] Updated relevant README if adding new content
- [ ] Referenced issues with #issue_number
